description.value: Price 250 gp; Slot none; CL 2nd; Weight 1 lb.; Aura faint evocation DESCRIPTION This torch is made from a dull, gray wood that bears intricate carvings. It burns like a normal torch, but only gives off dim light in a 40-foot radius. In areas of normal light, the torch reduces the light level to dim. The torch has no effect in areas of bright light. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 125 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells light
